_doc: LLM price table for the cost ledger (execution/ops_platform/cost_ledger.py). USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Keys are matched as a prefix of the model name returned by the API (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18' matches 'gpt-4o-mini'); the LONGEST matching key wins, else '_default'. Update when pricing changes.
